subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! We have hearkened unto thy call, and the response thereof hath appeared and been sent forth from the Source of Utterance of the Beloved of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل ندایت را شنیدیم و جواب آن از مصدر بیان محبوب عالم ظاهر و صادر تا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @love of God, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc.
